message:
chore: ignore ephemeral scratch files; fix(bridge): parallel stdout/stderr reads to prevent pipe deadlock

- .gitignore: Add patterns for /test_* (root scratch binaries/scripts),
  .write_probe (filesystem probe), **/test_bug.rs, **/test_deadlock.rs
  (nested scratch reproduction scripts), /frankenredis/ (separate repo
  accidentally cloned into workspace)

- subprocess_bridge.rs: Replace wait_with_output() with parallel reader
  threads for stdout and stderr. The old approach could deadlock when a
  subprocess filled the OS pipe buffer for one stream while the bridge
  was blocked reading the other. Now spawns two threads that drain both
  streams concurrently, then collects results via mpsc channel after
  the child exits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -128,6 +128,11 @@ storage.sqlite3.bak
 *.orig
 *.patch
 *.bak
+/test_*
+.write_probe
+**/test_bug.rs
+**/test_deadlock.rs
+/frankenredis/
 
 # Agent tool MCP config backups (timestamped .bak files)
 .claude/*.bak
